title: Enhanced Nature+
description: Refresh nature side of minecraft with this pack!
body:
## 🌍 Introduction

Refresh your minecraft world with warianted and juicier grass, prettier dirt, 3D bushier plants and much more. This pack is not finished so dont forget to follow this project!

Here is a [quick guide to how to install texture packs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I8BmnjowFrE) by GuideRealm.

No mods required.

## 🌍 Meet Enhanced

- [Enhanced Wood](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-wood)
- [Enhanced GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-gui)
- [Enhanced Archery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-archery)
- [Enhanced Explosions  ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-explosions)
- [Enhanced Jewelrys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-jewelrys)

## 🌍 Other Media

If you found a bug, or want to suggest your own idea you can chat with me about it on our [Discord]

You can support me or buy texture pack on the [Patreon]

Also check out my [PMC page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/WindyBee/)
